description:
from the INST HEALTH_STATUS packet without sending commands. Compute the arithmetic mean, population variance (divide by n), and population standard deviation for each sensor. Save a structured JSON report to /home/ga/Desktop/noise_characterization.json containing the keys 'target' ('INST'), 'packet' ('HEALTH_STATUS'), 'sample_count' (50), 'quiescent_state' (true), and 'sensors' (a dictionary for TEMP1 and TEMP2, each containing 'mean', 'variance', 'std_dev', and 'raw_samples'). OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
